requirement_topic.en: Bahrain MEWA 2025 EV Charging Regulatory Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 巴林MEWA 2025年电动汽车充电监管框架
requirement_topic.zht: 巴林MEWA 2025年電動汽車充電監管框架

summary.en: In November 2025, Bahrain's Ministry of Electricity and Water Affairs (MEWA) introduced its first comprehensive regulatory framework for EV charging operations, published in the Official Gazette. The framework, issued by Minister Yasser Humaidan, governs installation, connection, operation, and safety standards for all EV charging equipment in Bahrain whether for personal or commercial use. EWA is granted authority to: set technical and safety standards for EV charging equipment; approve grid-connection agreements; maintain a national register of all EV charging equipment; and define obligations for equipment owners, contractors, and consultants. All EV chargers — whether home, commercial, or public fast-charging — are within scope. Non-compliant equipment is subject to enforcement.
summary.zh: 2025年11月，巴林电力和水务部（MEWA）推出了首个全面的电动汽车充电运营监管框架，并在《官方公报》上发布。该框架由部长Yasser Humaidan颁布，管理巴林所有充电设备（无论个人或商业用途）的安装、接入、运营和安全标准。EWA获授权：制定充电设备技术和安全标准；审批并网协议；维护全国充电设备登记册；及规定设备业主、承包商和顾问的义务。家用、商用和公共快充等所有充电设备均在监管范围内。不合规设备将受到执法处理。
summary.zht: 2025年11月，巴林電力和水務部（MEWA）推出了首個全面的電動汽車充電運營監管框架，並在《官方公報》上發布。該框架由部長Yasser Humaidan頒布，管理巴林所有充電設備（無論個人或商業用途）的安裝、接入、運營和安全標準。EWA獲授權：制定充電設備技術和安全標準；審批併網協議；維護全國充電設備登記冊；及規定設備業主、承包商和顧問的義務。家用、商用和公共快充等所有充電設備均在監管範圍內。不合規設備將受到執法處理。

standards_or_laws: Bahrain MEWA EV charging regulatory framework (November 2025, Official Gazette, issued by Minister Yasser Humaidan)
EWA national register and grid-connection approval requirements for EV charging equipment

summary.en: China's EV charging infrastructure is regulated through MIIT, NEA, and grid company frameworks including GB/T 27930-2023 (communication protocol for DC charging), GB/T 18487.1-2023, and utility grid-connection approval. These frameworks are entirely separate from Bahrain's MEWA / EWA EV charging regulatory system and provide no standing in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 中国充电基础设施通过工信部、国家能源局和电网公司框架进行监管，包括GB/T 27930-2023（直流充电通信协议）、GB/T 18487.1-2023和公用事业并网批准。这些框架与巴林MEWA / EWA充电监管体系完全独立，在巴林不具效力。
summary.zht: 中國充電基礎設施通過工信部、國家能源局和電網公司框架進行監管，包括GB/T 27930-2023（直流充電通信協議）、GB/T 18487.1-2023和公用事業併網批准。這些框架與巴林MEWA / EWA充電監管體系完全獨立，在巴林不具效力。

standards_or_laws: China NEA EV charging infrastructure regulations

gap.en: All EV chargers intended for sale or installation in Bahrain must comply with the MEWA 2025 framework and be registered with EWA. Exporters should contact EWA to confirm the equipment registration process, technical standards required, and approved contractor requirements before committing to supply. China domestic EV charging approvals have no standing under the Bahrain framework.
gap.zh: 所有拟在巴林销售或安装的充电设备必须符合MEWA 2025框架，并在EWA登记注册。出口商在确定供货前应联系EWA，确认设备注册流程、技术标准要求和认可承包商要求。中国国内充电批准在巴林框架下不具效力。
gap.zht: 所有擬在巴林銷售或安裝的充電設備必須符合MEWA 2025框架，並在EWA登記注冊。出口商在確定供貨前應聯繫EWA，確認設備注冊流程、技術標準要求和認可承包商要求。中國國內充電批准在巴林框架下不具效力。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for all EV charging equipment installed or operated in Bahrain under the November 2025 MEWA regulatory framework
mandatory_status.cn: China EV charging regulatory framework mandatory for China domestic EV charging equipment; separate from Bahrain MEWA framework

source.publisher: Zawya (reporting Bahrain Ministry of Electricity and Water Affairs / MEWA Official Gazette announcement)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain introduced a comprehensive EV charging regulatory framework in November 2025 via MEWA, granting EWA authority over technical standards, registration, and grid connection for all EV chargers. Contact EWA before any product launch in Bahrain to confirm registration requirements and applicable technical standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林于2025年11月通过MEWA引入了全面的充电监管框架，授权EWA对所有充电设备的技术标准、注册和并网负责。在巴林进行任何产品上市前，请联系EWA确认注册要求和适用技术标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林於2025年11月通過MEWA引入了全面的充電監管框架，授權EWA對所有充電設備的技術標準、注冊和併網負責。在巴林進行任何產品上市前，請聯繫EWA確認注冊要求和適用技術標準。
